name: Claude Resources Inc.
description: Claude Resources Inc. was a Canadian gold exploration and mining company based in Saskatoon, Saskatchewan. The company was primarily engaged in the acquisition, exploration, development, and operation of gold properties, most notably the Seabee Gold Operation in northern Saskatchewan. In 2016, Claude Resources was acquired by Silver Standard Resources Inc. (now SSR Mining Inc.) in a transaction that consolidated the Seabee mine into SSR Mining's portfolio.
